creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
There is another trap when I'm trying to power on modem:
 
 Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
 cpuid = 1; apic id = 01
 fault virtual address	= 0x4c
 fault code		= supervisor read, page not present
 instruction pointer	= 0x20:0xc04cb0cc
 stack pointer	        = 0x28:0xe35bbc44
 frame pointer	        = 0x28:0xe35bbc70
 code segment		= base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
 			= DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
 processor eflags	= interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
 current process		= 27 (irq18: uhci2)
 trap number		= 12
 panic: page fault
 cpuid = 1
 Uptime: 3d11h21m58s
 Dumping 1022 MB (4 chunks)
   chunk 0: 1MB (159 pages) ... ok
   chunk 1: 1022MB (261490 pages) 1006 990 974 958 942 926 910 894 878 862 846 830 814 798 782 766 750 734 718 702 686 670 654 638 622 606 590 574 558 542 526 510 494 478 462 446 430 414 398 382 366 350 334 318 302 286 270 254 238 222 206 190 174 158 142  126 110 94 78 62 46 30 14

 	in pcpu.h

 #4  0xc0675718 in trap_pfault (frame=0xe35bbc04, usermode=0, eva=76)
     at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/trap.c:745

 #6  0xc06604ca in calltrap () at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/exception.s:139
 #7  0xc04cb0cc in usb_transfer_complete (xfer=0xc51f3300) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usbdi.c:833
 #8  0xc04bd91b in uhci_idone (ii=0x0) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c:1499
 #9  0xc04bda94 in uhci_softintr (v=0xc4be1000) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c:1374
 #10 0xc04bd75e in uhci_intr1 (sc=0xc4be1000) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c:1274

 #12 0xc0501cb4 in fork_exit (callout=0xc05032b8 <ithread_loop>, arg=0x0, frame=0x0)
